children.text: To access your personalized healthcare information download the MyChart app.
Once downloaded, the Sanford Patient App will seamlessly connect to your health information.
I have access and just need the app
I want to learn more about My Sanford Chart
We'll send you an email with directions to access My Sanford Chart
Go to mysanfordchart.org to fill out the request form.
You will be redirected to the Google Play store
Access your My Sanford Chart account on your mobile device using a free app. The app is password protected to ensure that only you have access to your personal health information.
